results.title: Synlait Milk Secures NZ$450 Million Refinancing for Turnaround Strategy
results.description: Synlait Milk has finalized a crucial NZ$450 million refinancing package, aligning with its Stabilise, Simplify, Scale strategy. The package integrates a new bank facility and a replacement shareholder loan from Bright Dairy.

results.title: Colorado priest in ill health faces deportation to Uganda as supporters search for help
results.description: DENVER — A Colorado priest who has been in the United States for 24 years is on the brink of being deported to Uganda, where his supporters say he could face political persecution from the regime ruling his home country....

results.title: Osun-Osogbo festival: Guinness set to celebrate cultural identity through Orijin
results.description: Guinness Nigeria Plc has reaffirmed its commitment to shaping and celebrating Nigeria’s cultural identity through Orijin, its flagship mainstream spirits brand, as preparations intensify for the 2026 Osun-Osogbo Festival. The commitment was reiterated at the Osun-Osogbo Global Summit 2026 Press Conference held in Osogbo, Osun State, ahead of the annual festival scheduled to take place [...] The post Osun-Osogbo festival: Guinness set to celebrate cultural identity through Orijin appeared first on Vanguard News .

results.title: Court orders INEC to release ADA access code
results.description: A Federal High Court has ordered INEC to release the All Democratic Alliance (ADA) access code, enabling the party to complete its registration process. Read More: https://punchng.com/court-orders-inec-to-release-ada-access-code/

results.title: ‘Illegal USD 1 bn transfers since 2023’: UNP challenges Prez to reveal identities of culprits
results.description: The United National Party (UNP) has asked President Anura Kumara Dissanayake to reveal the identities of those who fraudulently transferred nearly USD 1 bn (approximately Rs 300 bn), since 2023. UNP leader Ranil Wickremesinghe, in his capacity as the Prime Minister, held the Finance portfolio from 25 May 2022, before he was appointed the President [...]

results.title: Reijnders dropped by the Dutch while Morocco make four changes
Kawhi Leonard trade talks heat up as Clippers salary-cap circumvention findings loom
results.description: LOS ANGELES — Reasons for the Clippers to trade Kawhi Leonard are apparent. So are reasons to keep the seven-time All-Pro forward who turned 35 on Monday.
